CLOSING LETTER BRIEF FILED BY PLAINTIFF L.A.LINK CORP.,A CALIF CORP.,DBA L.A. LINK CORP.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: AS TO THE CROSS COMPLAINT OF EDWARD WING WAN FUNG: CROSS DEFT. JOSEPHINE Y.H. LEE, DBA CAL SUPPLIES CO. & MARKET IS HEREEBY DEEMEDLIABLE TO CROSS COMPLAINANT EDWARD WING WAN FUNG, & SHALL INDEMNIFY CROSS COMPLAINANT FOR THE SUM OF $11184.11 PRINCIPAL, $1070.00 INTEREST (7% 5/10/93), & COSTS OF SUIT THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT IS DEEMED TO BE LIA- BLE TO PLAINTIFF L.A. LINK CORPORATION. CROSS COMPLAINANT EDWARD WING WAN FUNG IS FURTHER AWARDED $ COSTS (PER COST BILL). AS TO THE CROSS COMPLAINT OF JOSEPHINE Y.H. LEE: CROSS COMPLAINANT JOSEPHINE Y.H. LEE, DBA CAL SUPPLIES CO. & MARKET TAKE NOTHING FROM CROSS DEFT. EDWARD WING WAN FUNG ON THE CROSS COMPLAINT, SAID CROSS DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $ COSTS (PER COST BILL).
